ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the clothing item */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the clothing item (e.g., shirt, pants) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing item (e.g., S, M, L, XL, XXL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material composition of the clothing item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image of the clothing item */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorization and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the warehouse is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the item is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold level for triggering a reorder */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for replenishing the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the total cost is denominated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language used in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the customer's last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
